# Generated by `deno task compile:validation:update` — do NOT hand-edit.
#
# A known-bug RATCHET over Svelte's own validation suites
# (../svelte/packages/svelte/tests/{compiler-errors,validator}). Every OVER-ACCEPT
# line is a KNOWN BUG: the oracle REJECTS that component and tsv compiles it anyway,
# which the refusal contract forbids. The file shrinking is the goal — the gate fails
# on a line that is NOT here (a new over-acceptance) and on a line here that no longer
# fires (delete it when you fix one, so the list cannot rot).
#
# A MISMATCH is NEVER listed: both sides compiled and the code differs, an absolute
# bug, so it always fails the gate rather than being pinned.
#
# An ORACLE-ERROR line is an UPSTREAM defect, not tsv's. The sidecar forces
# `runes: true` (the oracle is runes-only by design) and one upstream sample makes
# svelte's own warning constructor throw under that flag; it compiles fine at the
# default mode. It is pinned rather than skipped so it stays visible AND so a
# different future harness error still fails. Caveat: an errored file gets no oracle
# verdict, so tsv is never probed on it — a pinned one could hide an over-acceptance.
#
# ORACLE-ERROR is the ONLY pinnable harness failure. Every other one — a tsv compiler
# self-check, a tsv parse over-rejection, a canonicalizer failure, an unreadable file,
# a dead sidecar — is tsv's or the machine's, never upstream's, so it is UNPINNABLE
# and fails the gate outright rather than appearing here.
#
# Refusal / fenced counts are deliberately NOT pinned: a refusal is not a defect, and
# its buckets churn with every compiler slice.
#
# Format: KIND<TAB>ORACLE_CODE<TAB>PATH (path relative to its suite root)
# shapes: 36
OVER-ACCEPT	attribute_invalid_event_handler	validator/samples/event-attribute/input.svelte
OVER-ACCEPT	attribute_invalid_name	validator/samples/attribute-invalid-name-2/input.svelte
OVER-ACCEPT	attribute_invalid_name	validator/samples/attribute-invalid-name-3/input.svelte

OVER-ACCEPT	props_illegal_name	compiler-errors/samples/runes-props-illegal-name-1/main.svelte

OVER-ACCEPT	script_invalid_context	validator/samples/script-invalid-context/input.svelte
OVER-ACCEPT	slot_attribute_invalid_placement	compiler-errors/samples/component-slot-nested-error-3/main.svelte
OVER-ACCEPT	slot_attribute_invalid_placement	validator/samples/component-slotted-custom-element-2/input.svelte

OVER-ACCEPT	slot_attribute_invalid_placement	validator/samples/component-slotted-if-block/input.svelte

OVER-ACCEPT	snippet_conflict	compiler-errors/samples/snippet-children-conflict/main.svelte
OVER-ACCEPT	snippet_invalid_export	compiler-errors/samples/snippet-invalid-export/main.svelte
OVER-ACCEPT	snippet_shadowing_prop	validator/samples/snippet-shadowing-prop/input.svelte

OVER-ACCEPT	tag_invalid_name	compiler-errors/samples/component-invalid-name/main.svelte
OVER-ACCEPT	unexpected_reserved_word	validator/samples/dynamic-element-this/input.svelte
ORACLE-ERROR	oracle-tool: An impossible situation occurred	validator/samples/silence-warnings-2/input.svelte
